title: Create a package using epiverse/packagetemplate
text: Go epiverse-trace/packagetemplate GH Click Use template, Create new repository Name repo click Create repository Clone repo developer machine Install dev dependency {etdev} using pak::pak("epiverse-trace/etdev") Run devtools::load_all() check errors Update DESCRIPTION NAMESPACE files Start developing Replace packagetemplate package name tests/testthat.R file

title: Create a package using epiverse/packagetemplate
text: Codecov, sign account follow instructions set Recon. Used image instead repo image appear broken might temporary. Updated render_readme.yml adding trailing -- git diff-index --quiet HEAD -- line 87. Based reference Also found GH Action logs script didn’t permission commit build README.md file repo. fixed allowing workflow permission read/write GH repo > Actions > General (scroll bottom)

what: Convert words to numbers in multiple languages
title: Convert words to numbers in multiple languages
text: numberizeR R package convert whole numbers written words zero nine hundred ninety nine trillion, nine hundred ninety nine billion, nine hundred ninety nine million, nine hundred ninety nine thousand, nine hundred ninety nine English, French Spanish character string numeric value. numberizeR developed Centre Mathematical Modelling Infectious Diseases London School Hygiene Tropical Medicine part Epiverse-TRACE program.

title: Convert words to numbers in multiple languages
text: can install development version numberizeR GitHub :

title: Convert words to numbers in multiple languages
text: examples illustrate current functionalities
code: devtools::load_all()  formatC(numberize("nine hundred and ninety-nine trillion, nine hundred and ninety-nine billion, nine hundred and ninety-nine million, nine hundred and ninety-nine thousand, nine hundred and ninety-nine"), big.mark = ",", format = "fg") #> "999,999,999,999,999"      numberize("Siete mil quinientos cuarenta y cinco", lang = "es") #> 7545  numberize("zéro",  lang = "fr") #> 0

title: Convert words to numbers in multiple languages
text: package currently experimental, defined RECON software lifecycle. means draft functional package, interfaces functionalities may change time, testing documentation may lacking.

title: Convert words to numbers in multiple languages
